title: 3.28.0 Hotfix 12
changes: Fixed Imbued gems not showing their inherent Level 1 Support in the Trade Market.
Fixed a bug where Corrupting a Blighted Map to a higher tier would remove the specific map area, making that Blighted Map invalid.
Fixed an issue where you could lose spectres on area transition with animate weapon of self reflection
Fixed a bug on Standard that caused special Atlas nodes to not be completable.
This patch has been deployed without restarting the servers. You will need to update your client to receive the client changes in this patch.
